name: Sui Basecamp 2026
edition: Sui Basecamp 2026 (3rd annual) — NOT officially confirmed as of 2026-06-17. Most recent VERIFIED edition is Sui Basecamp 2025 (2nd annual). The inaugural event was Sui Basecamp 2024 in Paris.
location: 2026: tentatively Singapore per an unofficial 'Registration Test' page (test.buildonsui.io) — UNCONFIRMED. 2025 (verified): InterContinental Dubai Festival City, Dubai, UAE. 2024 (verified): Paris, France.
dates: 2026: tentatively September 15-17, 2026 per the unofficial test page (UNCONFIRMED, and these dates fall just AFTER the June-2025-to-June-2026 window). 2025 (verified): May 1-2, 2025 (falls just BEFORE the window start). 2024: Paris.
attendance: 2026: '3K+ attendees' claimed on the unofficial test page (UNCONFIRMED). 2025 (verified): 2,000+ attendees from 90+ countries. 2024 inaugural: ~1,100 attendees from 65 countries.
defi_themes: DeFi on Sui ecosystem builders (DEXs, lending, liquidity) — a 'DeFi on Sui' Ecosystem Builders Panel is listed on the unofficial 2026 test agenda (UNCONFIRMED)
Stablecoins on Sui — FDUSD native deployment by First Digital; suiUSDe stablecoin expansion (verified, 2025 edition)
Bitcoin Finance / BTCfi — Babylon Labs Bitcoin staking & restaking integration (verified, 2025 edition)
Institutional DeFi & adoption — ETF filings, partnerships with Grayscale and Franklin Templeton; traditional-finance crossover (verified, 2025 edition)
Maturing on-chain financial infrastructure layer powering next-gen DeFi (verified theme, 2025 edition)
DeFi policy / regulation trends and infra maturity (reported theme, 2025 edition)
Core DeFi protocol ecosystem: DEXs (Cetus), lending/borrowing (NAVI Protocol, Suilend), oracles (Pyth) as sponsors/builders (verified, 2025 edition)

notable_panels.title: DeFi on Sui (Ecosystem Builders Panel)
notable_panels.topic: Decentralized finance on the Sui network — DEXs, lending, ecosystem DeFi protocols
notable_panels.speakers: Not published. UNCONFIRMED — appears only on the unofficial 'Registration Test' page (test.buildonsui.io), Day 2 ~1:00pm. Not on any official Sui channel.

notable_speakers.name: Elliscope Fang
notable_speakers.affiliation: Co-Founder, NAVI Protocol (lending/borrowing DeFi on Sui) — confirmed speaker at the 2025 edition; no 2026 lineup published

key_takeaways: No officially announced Sui Basecamp 2026 exists as of 2026-06-17: the official Sui press center (Feb-Mar 2026), blog, and FAQ contain no 2026 Basecamp announcement; the main buildonsui.io domain serves only a default nginx placeholder page.

The only '2026' source is test.buildonsui.io, explicitly labeled 'Registration Test' — it lists Sept 15-17, 2026 in Singapore, 3K+ attendees, 50+ speakers, and a 'DeFi on Sui' panel, but this is unverified placeholder data and NOT an official announcement.
Those tentative 2026 dates (mid-September 2026) fall just AFTER the June-2025-to-June-2026 window, so in_window is set false.

The most recent VERIFIED edition, Sui Basecamp 2025 (Dubai, May 1-2, 2025), is the substantive DeFi signal: it positioned Sui's 'rapidly maturing financial layer powering next-gen DeFi and Bitcoin Finance.'

2025 DeFi highlights (verified): First Digital deploying FDUSD natively on Sui; suiUSDe stablecoin expansion; Babylon Labs BTCfi; institutional crossover via Grayscale and Franklin Templeton; ecosystem DeFi protocols Cetus (DEX), NAVI & Suilend (lending), and Pyth (oracle) as sponsors/builders.

Confidence is LOW for any 2026-specific claim. No panels or speakers were fabricated; the single panel listed is flagged as unconfirmed test-page data, and all named speakers are verified 2025-edition speakers, not confirmed for 2026.
